---
title: "Our approach and measurement framework"
subtitle: |
  The rationale for measuring and comparing national civil services
image: "path/to/preview/img.png"
image-alt: "Alt text for the image"
date: "2024-01-01"
author: "A N OTHER"
order: 1

format:
  html:
    toc: true

execute: 
  echo: false
---

Page/article content goes here.

## L2 heading

More content.

### L3 heading

More content, don't go beyond an L3 heading.

Use double **asterisks** to denote bold text. Lighter emphasis is also
available using single *asterisks* but should be avoided.

:::{.grid .custom-page-nav}
:::{.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .nav-page .nav-page-previous}
:::
:::{.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .nav-page .nav-page-next}
[Data processing](data_processing.qmd){.pagination-link}
:::
:::
